rationale.ai-review: multi-agent LLM agents judge code changes for vulnerabilities/consistency/format
rationale.built-system: implemented, benchmarked across nine languages, code publicly released
rationale.general-code: overseen code is human GitHub PRs; AI reviews only (CodeAgent ruling)
rationale.risk-security: focal vulnerability-detection task with empirical hit-rate results
rationale.risk-quality: format/consistency/revision mitigations targeting maintainability and readability
